note: Verified against English Wikipedia (infobox career tables + leads) and club/press sources on 2026-07-14. Identities disambiguated via TM dataset DOB/position/club (data/cache/tm_datasets_players.csv). Dominant defect class: namesake-contaminated DB rows (id belongs to an older/obscure player, club/league/MV copied from a famous namesake). league is null for non-big-5; apply script keeps existing league in that case (several rows keep a WRONG big-5 league that this pipeline cannot null out - see stage-2b report). Records with new_club true need a club_id_map/current_team addition and will land in unresolved_clubs.json on apply.
